====Battle Tree====
Guzma appears in the [[Battle Tree]] exclusively in [[Pokémon Sun and Moon|Pokémon Moon]] and [[Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon|Ultra Moon]]. He uses three of the Pokémon below in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle]]s, and two in [[Multi Battle]]s.

}}
